title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, generate, pull and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, embeddings and tool calling.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI); chat, PDF, RAG, voice, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; async & sync APIs, Android compatible, Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat and generate completions.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for running Ollama containerized.

title: ollama-nvidia-trt
summary: Experimental integration enabling NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM backend for faster inference in Ollama.

title: ollama-rag-stack
summary: Production-ready RAG template using Ollama, FastAPI, Qdrant and Azure Container Apps.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to Ollama’s REST API with serde models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama with async streaming, dependency injection and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered apps.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama for summarizing notes and brainstorming.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official Ollama package on npm; zero-dependency TypeScript client for Node & browsers.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official Ollama package on PyPI; lightweight Python client for chat, generate and embeddings.
